{{Infobox construct
| name = Green Titan
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Green Titan]] is one of the [[Divine Titans]].}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Green Titan]] is a [[Divine Titan]] fighting defensively.}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Green Titan]] is being repaired and is meant for those with an affinity for [[Aethertech guns]].}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
